english: A dry length of wood collected from bushes and shrubbery.
Plant fibres twisted together into a crude binding material.
A sturdy branch cut from a tree using the Crude Axe.
Thick bark stripped from a tree using the Crude Axe.
A fractured piece of stone with a usable cutting edge.
A primitive axe made from rope, sticks and stone. It can strip bark and cut branches from trees.
A long branch tipped with sharp stone and secured with fibre rope.
Overlapping bark panels protecting the body.
Crude bark guards protecting the hands.
Layered bark and fibre bindings protecting the feet.
A fragmented transmission containing the final survival protocol.
A sealed metallic core pawned to the trader by a vanished scavenger. It remained inert until you approached and now emits a slow emerald pulse.
The reader has awakened the core. Four compatible integration protocols are encoded within it. Only one can be accepted.
A crude forge-based reader rebuilt to analyse a single Helix Core. Its design is temporary, but the choice it reveals is permanent.

EARTHBOUND ADAPTATION

TERRA specialises in mining, stonework and physical resilience. It is built for players who want stronger harvesting, greater block damage and improved survival against harsh terrain.

PRIMARY MATERIALS: Clay, stone and ore.
MUTATION RISK: Low.

Crafting this protocol consumes the Analysed Helix Core and permanently rejects the other Bloodlines.

VERDANT ADAPTATION

GAIA specialises in farming, harvesting and biological recovery. It is built for players who want better plant yields, stronger food production and nature-focused survival.

PRIMARY MATERIALS: Fibres, wood and cultivated resources.
MUTATION RISK: Low.

Crafting this protocol consumes the Analysed Helix Core and permanently rejects the other Bloodlines.

MECHANICAL ADAPTATION

FORGE specialises in engineering, weapons and machine integration. It is built for players who want advanced fabrication, stronger technology and improved mechanical combat.

PRIMARY MATERIALS: Scrap iron, forged metal and mechanical parts.
MUTATION RISK: Medium.

Crafting this protocol consumes the Analysed Helix Core and permanently rejects the other Bloodlines.

NEURAL ADAPTATION

ORION specialises in electronics, information and precision. It is built for players who want faster technological progression, better detection and high-end energy systems.

PRIMARY MATERIALS: Electrical parts, electronics and encoded data.
MUTATION RISK: High.

Crafting this protocol consumes the Analysed Helix Core and permanently rejects the other Bloodlines.
A compressed geological profile created by the Helix Reader from clay and stone.
A calibrated mineral sample containing iron, coal, nitrate and lead signatures.
A dense structural core designed to teach the Helix how constructed matter bears weight.
A compressed archive of deep-vein pressure and earthbound resonance.
A partially assembled genome matrix awaiting final mineral integration.
The completed TERRA sequence. Its mineral pattern has permanently bonded to the host.
Consciousness returns in fragments. Gather plant fibres, sticks and small stones from the surrounding area.
Twist gathered plant fibres into crude rope.
Combine rope, sticks and stone to construct a crude axe.
Use the Crude Axe to cut branches and strip bark from trees. Recover sharp stone while mining. Construct a Crude Pike and a complete set of bark armour.
Craft any available bedroll colour and place it, then craft and place a campfire to establish a temporary shelter.
Eliminate five infected entities to demonstrate basic combat readiness.
The survival transmission has identified a nearby survivor outpost. Reach the trader and establish contact.

Hold on... that thing is reacting to you. Some scavenger pawned it here months ago and claimed he found it inside an underground facility. It has been dead ever since. Then you walk in and it starts lighting up. Take it. Just be careful what you wake up.
Construct and Place the Helix Reader
The core is broadcasting a structured signal. Rebuild a forge into a Primitive Helix Reader and place it somewhere secure.
Insert the Dormant Helix Core into the Primitive Helix Reader and begin analysis. The recovered archive contains four compatible protocols, but integration will permanently reject the other three.
ANALYSIS COMPLETE. Four viable integration protocols recovered. Return to the Helix Reader, review each Bloodline and craft one protocol. This decision cannot be reversed.

The protocol has accepted your genome, but acceptance is not integration. Recover enough clay and stone for the Helix Reader to build its first geological map, then compress the data into a Stone Analysis.
Common stone is only the surface layer. Extract iron, coal, nitrate and lead in meaningful quantities and fuse their signatures into a Vein Sample.
Prove You Can Build What Lasts
TERRA does not recognise temporary shelters as survival. Accumulate the timber, stone and processed components needed for a permanent earthbound stronghold.
Feed the gathered materials and the Vein Sample into the Helix Reader. The resulting Foundation Core will preserve the memory of weight, pressure and deliberate construction.
The adaptation now reinforces muscle and bone. Put that change under sustained stress, then return to excavation while the Helix records how your body responds.
The Foundation Core has begun detecting pressure patterns from deeper strata. Gather a substantial reserve of stone, clay and iron to expose the next layer of the sequence.
The Helix Reader can now compress the Foundation Core and deep-vein reserves into a Seismic Core. This is the first component capable of rewriting the host rather than merely observing it.
The Seismic Core is changing the density of your tissue. Survive a prolonged combat cycle and accumulate forged material while the new structure stabilises.
Strip the World to Its Memory
A vast mineral reserve is required for the next stage. This is not a sample run. Establish a serious mining operation and extract enough material to feed a full genomic reconstruction.
The Seismic Core has enough geological memory to form a living template. Construct the TERRA Genome Matrix in the Helix Reader.
The matrix is missing signatures formed over immense periods of heat and pressure. Recover deep reserves of coal, nitrate and lead to complete the archive.
Give the Matrix a Machine to Speak Through
The matrix now produces a repeating pulse, but it cannot sustain itself. Gather forged iron, mechanical parts and electrical components for the final integration assembly.
The Helix has begun treating your body as a geological structure. Endure an extended combat trial and continue mining until the signal remains stable under every recorded strain.
Cross the Point of No Return
All required signatures are present. Use the Helix Reader to bind the Genome Matrix to the accumulated mineral archive and create the Integrated TERRA Genome.
The genome is complete, but the Helix demands one final proof. Carry the integrated sequence through a massive combat and excavation cycle. When it remains stable, TERRA will become permanent.

TERRA INTEGRATION COMPLETE. MINERAL DENSITY: STABLE. STRUCTURAL MEMORY: STABLE. EARTHBOUND RESONANCE: PERMANENT. The Helix no longer identifies you as a compatible subject. It identifies you as TERRA.
The GAIA directive has bonded with the Helix Core. Living plant matter now carries a repeating biological signature. Gather plant fibres to stabilise it.
The FORGE directive has bonded with the Helix Core. Processed metal now produces a recognisable molecular pattern. Gather scrap iron to begin calibration.
The ORION directive has bonded with the Helix Core. Electrical components now echo with encoded information. Gather electrical parts to begin decoding it.
